name: eat-what-you-kill
description: Sam Taggart's 'Eat What You Kill: Becoming a Sales Carnivore' — a sales system that transforms you from a passive lead-waiting herbivore into a hunter who finds, pursues, and closes deals on your own terms.
useCase: Develop a hunter's sales mindset, master prospecting and cold outreach, handle objections like a pro, and close more deals with confidence.
knownRisks: Aggressive 'carnivore' language may conflict with consultative/mission-driven sales approaches
Door-to-door and cold-calling focus — less directly applicable to account-based or relationship-sales roles
Results require high activity volume — not a 'hack' or shortcut system
